emails.subject: SQMD AUDIT
emails.body: SQMD AUDIT Mechelle, I should have an answer today on the month that had the greatest number of resubmittals to the ISO. What are the dates that the ISO is showing for the greatest UFE inpact? Also, I will try and set up a time later in the week that Murray O'neil and myself can come by to get an update on the audit. Thanks Chris

emails.subject: SQMD AUDIT
emails.body: SQMD AUDIT Mechelle, I apologize for not getting back w/ you in a timelier manner. I will see if there is any way we can fit something in for tomorrow. If not, we could come by some time during Labor Day week when we are back in town. Chris

emails.subject: RE: SQMD AUDIT
emails.body: RE: SQMD AUDIT Chris, No problem. Just trying to verify your/Murray's schedule. We will need to spend a fair amount of time together, as we previously discussed. I want to ensure you guys are aware of everything and we have thoroughly thought through the issues, how they are worded, what the corrective actions are, etc. So, we will need time to go through in detail, re-draft, review again, etc. until we are all confident we have a good product. With that in mind, you are in Houston the week Labor Day (Tue Fri??, I would guess?), what about the weeks of 8/27, 9/10 and 9/17? We are still receiving a few last details/wrap-up on the draft, as you know. We could review with you before it is totally completed, but the more complete the better. Just glancing at my schedule, it looks like next week and the week of Labor Day are already quite full, so the week of 9/10 may be best. We can jointly make the call when I hear back from you. Thanks. To: Atwood, Mechelle
